ruleNotes.paraphrase: Challenge stages are score exhibitions where enemies fly in formations and do not drop bombs.
ruleNotes.conformanceUse: Maintain no-shot/no-ship-loss safety as a guardrail, but do not allow it to inflate visual/movement conformance.

ruleNotes.paraphrase: Boss aliens require multiple hits before destruction and are tied to capture/rescue behavior.
ruleNotes.conformanceUse: Boss first-hit damage feedback should remain visually and aurally distinct from full destruction.

ruleNotes.paraphrase: As the game progresses, alien attacks and formations become more complex.
ruleNotes.conformanceUse: Stage-arc metrics should penalize repetitive patterns even when they are technically safe.

ruleNotes.paraphrase: Special transform enemies appear after early stages and cycle through different visual families.
ruleNotes.conformanceUse: Aurora's novelty axis should track special alien introduction and not only lane count or speed.

measurementLimits: This is a partial derived surface map, not a pixel-level screenshot pack.
Do not score visual shell conformance as high from this artifact alone.
Promote approved screenshots or controlled frames before using it for fine visual comparisons.
